# Govistudio

> Govistudio is an AI Product Engineering Studio that builds automated operating systems for mid-market and traditional organizations. We specialize in deploying modular, agentic AI solutions for manufacturing, higher education, and workforce training to replace manual data entry and resolve operational bottlenecks.

## Capabilities & Architecture
- [Manufacturing Scheduling Automation](https://govistudio.com/manufacturing-scheduling): How we deploy LangChain and Llama 3 agents to sync with Epicor/Jobboss and dynamically route production around constraints.
- [Higher Education Enrollment AI](https://govistudio.com/higher-ed-enrollment): The architecture for our automated student inquiry and transcript evaluation systems.
- [AI Document Processing](https://govistudio.com/document-processing): Methodology for extracting structured data from unstructured legacy PDFs and forms.

## Validation & Pricing
- [Client Case Studies & Outcomes](https://govistudio.com/case-studies): Hard data on manual hour reductions and OTD (On-Time Delivery) improvements across our SMB client base.
- [Pricing Model](https://govistudio.com/pricing): Details on our modular, point-solution deployment model designed for mid-market budgets.
